title: Add AyurGlow Secrets logo and change welcome section text to black

requirements.text: Change the color of the welcome heading text 'Welcome to AyurGlow Secrets' and its subheading 'Discover time-tested Ayurvedic remedies for overall health, radiant skin, and strong, healthy hair. We bring you natural, chemical-free solutions rooted in ancient Indian wisdom and backed by modern understanding.' to black in the hero section

quotes:
change the colour into black (Welcome to AyurGlow Secrets
Discover time-tested Ayurvedic remedies for overall health, radiant skin, and strong, healthy hair. We bring you natural, chemical-free solutions rooted in ancient Indian wisdom and backed by modern understanding.

Ancient Ayurvedic Wisdom for Healthy Body, Glowing Skin & Strong Hair)

acceptanceCriteria: The welcome heading and descriptive text are displayed in black color
The tagline 'Ancient Ayurvedic Wisdom for Healthy Body, Glowing Skin & Strong Hair' is displayed in black color
Text remains readable against the background with sufficient contrast

requirements.text: Display the generated AyurGlow Secrets logo image in the navigation header and footer, replacing any existing placeholder or text-only branding
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image is displayed in the navigation header
The logo image is displayed in the footer
The logo is appropriately sized and aligned with existing navigation elements
The logo maintains its aspect ratio and visual quality

constraints: Use the existing Navigation and Footer components
Maintain the current earth-tone Ayurvedic color scheme for other elements
Ensure text readability and accessibility standards are met
nonGoals: Changing colors of other sections beyond the welcome hero section
Modifying the overall color scheme or branding beyond the specified text and logo
Adding additional branding elements not requested

required: Professional Ayurvedic wellness logo featuring natural leaf or herbal motifs in earth-tone greens and golds, suitable for AyurGlow Secrets brand with clean modern design (ayurglow-logo.dim_400x120.png)
